description: Trigger eval cases for subtree install/update/migrate vs harness-upgrade near-misses.

should_trigger.query: Install skills-harness as a git subtree at .skills-harness/
Vendor the skills-harness kit so we can git subtree pull updates
Add the skills-harness subtree to this consumer repo
Run git subtree pull to update our vendored harness
should_trigger.reason: Update vendored kit via subtree pull

should_trigger.query: Update vendored harness after subtree pull — reconcile index and meta
Migrate our manual .skills/ file-copy install to subtree vendoring
Convert this harness install to subtree using migrate-to-subtree.sh
We have .skills/ but no .skills-harness/ — switch to subtree updates

should_not_trigger.query: Upgrade our harness from 0.3.x to the latest version
Update harness files by copying from upstream
should_not_trigger.reason: Manual copy upgrade path, not subtree

should_not_trigger.query: Enable native IDE discovery with link.sh

should_not_trigger.reason: IDE symlink migration, not subtree vendoring

should_not_trigger.query: Bump kit_version in _meta.yml after copying check.sh
Import a skill from another repo into _skills/
Publish our custom skill to another repository
Release a new skills-harness kit version and bump CHANGELOG
